scripts: create service user jigsaw-service-user with path system/cq:services/jigsaw

set ACL for jigsaw-service-user
allow jcr:read on /home
end

set ACL for jigsaw-service-user
allow jcr:read,jcr:readAccessControl on /content
end

set ACL for jigsaw-service-user
allow jcr:read,jcr:write on /var
end

set ACL for jigsaw-service-user
allow jcr:all on /home/users
end
